summary: Package Management Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified via Playwright automation. The Packages tab in Planning Board allows creating, editing, and deleting packages with scope items and material items. Material Names and Brands can be created inline via '+ Create New' options in dropdowns. Brand dropdown is correctly filtered by selected material.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: Material Names and Brands endpoints correctly handle duplicates by returning existing entry with 'exists: true'
Backend: Brands GET endpoint correctly filters by category (material name) using case-insensitive regex
Backend: Packages CRUD endpoints properly validate Planning role access
Frontend: Package dialog has all required fields with correct data-testid attributes
Frontend: Material dropdown shows '+ Create New Material' option that opens inline input
Frontend: Brand dropdown is disabled until material is selected, then shows filtered brands
Frontend: Toast notifications confirm successful creation of materials, brands, and packages
seed_data_creation: Created test packages, materials, and brands during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Package Management feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/material-names, GET/POST /api/brands (with ?category filter), GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/packages. Frontend: Packages tab (data-testid='tab-packages'), Add Package button (data-testid='add-package-btn'), dialog fields (pkg-name, pkg-rate, pkg-desc), scope items (add-scope-item, scope-name-{idx}, scope-unit-{idx}, scope-rate-{idx}), material items (add-material-item, mat-name-{idx}, mat-brand-{idx}), save button (save-package-btn). Inline create: new-mat-input-{idx}, new-brand-input-{idx}.

Backend Endpoints.GET /api/material-names: PASS - Returns all material names (Cement, Steel, Sand + test data)
Backend Endpoints.POST /api/material-names: PASS - Creates new material name, returns existing if duplicate
Backend Endpoints.GET /api/brands?category=Cement: PASS - Returns only brands linked to Cement
Backend Endpoints.POST /api/brands: PASS - Creates brand with category, returns existing if duplicate
Backend Endpoints.GET /api/packages/{package_id}: PASS - Returns package details with scope_items and material_items
Backend Endpoints.POST /api/packages: PASS - Creates package with scope_items and material_items (Planning role)
Backend Endpoints.PATCH /api/packages/{package_id}: PASS - Updates package name, rate, scope_items, material_items

Frontend Features.Packages List View: PASS - Shows package name, rate/sqft, scope count, material badges
Frontend Features.Package Dialog - Basic Fields: PASS - Package Name (pkg-name), Per Sq.ft Rate (pkg-rate), Description (pkg-desc)
Frontend Features.Package Dialog - Scope Items: PASS - Add Item button (add-scope-item), fields for name/unit/rate
Frontend Features.Package Dialog - Materials: PASS - Add Material button (add-material-item), Material dropdown, Brand dropdown
Frontend Features.Material Dropdown - Create New: PASS - '+ Create New Material' option opens inline input
Frontend Features.Brand Dropdown - Filtered: PASS - Shows only brands for selected material
Frontend Features.Brand Dropdown - Create New: PASS - '+ Create New Brand' option opens inline input
Frontend Features.Save Package: PASS - data-testid='save-package-btn' creates package and shows toast
Frontend Features.Edit Package: PASS - Edit button opens dialog with pre-filled data
Frontend Features.Delete Package: PASS - Delete button present for each package
